context: Tests correct CloudWatch Logs Insights URL construction with proper encoding.

checklist.name: Uses *XX not %XX for value encoding
checklist.description: All encoded characters in fragment values use asterisk prefix (e.g. *2f, *7c) not percent prefix (%2f, %7c)

checklist.name: Epoch timestamps in seconds
checklist.description: start and end values are Unix epoch seconds (10-digit numbers), not milliseconds (13-digit)

checklist.name: Region in both URL subdomain and query string
checklist.description: URL contains eu-west-1 in the subdomain AND as region= query parameter

checklist.name: Path segment separators encoded correctly
checklist.description: ? encoded as $3F and = encoded as $3D between path segments after the # fragment

checklist.name: Pipe character encoded as *7c
checklist.description: The | characters in the query are encoded as *7c

checklist.name: Slash encoded as *2f in query and log group
checklist.description: Forward slashes in query text and log group name are encoded as *2f

checklist.name: Newlines encoded as *0a
checklist.description: Line breaks between query clauses are encoded as *0a

checklist.name: @ symbol encoded as *40
checklist.description: The @ in @timestamp and @message is encoded as *40

checklist.name: Structural characters not encoded
checklist.description: Characters ~ ( ) ' used as CloudWatch URL structural delimiters are left literal, not encoded

checklist.name: timeType set to ABSOLUTE
checklist.description: URL includes timeType~'ABSOLUTE to use explicit start/end times
